key.name: enabled-widgets
key.description: The ordered list of glance widgets shown in the Today panel.

key.name: brief-enabled
key.description: Whether the Today panel includes the on-device-AI daily brief (gated on the resident model).

key.name: open-on-edge-swipe
key.summary: Open Today on a right-edge swipe
key.description: Whether a swipe from the right screen edge opens the Today panel.
